summary: REPEATING PATHS Characters can repeat paths and subpaths

mechanics.name_guess: REPEATING PATHS Characters can repeat paths and subpaths
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 026 > npcs > REPEATING PATHS Characters can repeat paths and subpaths
mechanics.excerpt: REPEATING PATHS Characters can repeat paths and subpaths whenever the Next Path option allows repeated path or subpath counts toward character' path limits_ repeated path has sub paths, the character must skip the main path and go directly to one of the subpaths (assuming the character meets the sub path's prerequisites).
